title: Comprehensive invalid-input errors
description: All invalid-input cases signal the correct condition with position. Tags: error(74), libyaml-err(4).
notes: Conformance pass push (337->369, 0 regressions). Invalid-input now signals for: trailing content after document/scalar/mapping (2CMS,BD7L,TD5N,GDY7,BS4K), a:b:c:d second-colon (ZCZ6), block-scalar leading-empty over-indent (5LLU,S98Z,W9L4), comment-after-key (GDY7), block-mapping/anchor on --- marker line (9KBC,CXX2), inline seq after key (5U3A), bad seq indent (4HVU), dangling anchor (GT5M), double-anchor on one node (4JVG), tag prefix (QLJ7). Tab-as-indentation rejection: 4EJS,DK95/06 (mapping indent), DK95/01 (quoted continuation), Y79Y/03 (flow), Y79Y/04-07 (after -/?/: indicators). error tag 57->73/74, libyaml-err 4/4.
close_reason: Invalid input errors: 7 tests, scanner/directive/reference/duplicate-key errors with position

title: Complex & empty keys
description: Non-scalar keys and empty/absent keys. Tags: complex-key(8), empty-key(9).
notes: Explicit/complex/empty keys: rewrote explicit-key (?) handling in read-block-mapping with read-explicit-value; explicit keys now support block seq/scalar/properties/flow as the key; null-valued explicit keys; comment lines between ? key and :. explicit-key 9->16, complex-key 5->7, empty-key 5->8.
close_reason: Implemented complex keys (flow collections, quoted strings) and empty keys via updated read-explicit-key and read-document-content

title: Directives %YAML / %TAG
description: %YAML version and %TAG handle declarations. Tag: directive(20).

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Directive errors now signal: duplicate %YAML, junk glued to %YAML version (MUS6), directives not followed by --- (9MMA/B63P). %TAG declarations accumulate into *tag-handles* per document and feed read-tag; duplicate %TAG handle errors. directive 14->19.

title: Indentation & whitespace engine
description: Column tracking, indentation context stack, line-fold primitives. Tags: whitespace(60), indent(31).
notes: FINAL: whitespace 5->11, indent 4->18, 0 regressions. Most remaining whitespace fails are conformance-data glyph artifacts (literal U+2423/U+00BB etc.) not parser defects.
close_reason: Added indent stack, whitespace predicates, indent counting/checking, line-break handling, and line-fold primitives to source.lisp

title: Single- & double-quoted scalars
description: Quoting and escape handling. Tags: double(32), single(9).
close_reason: Single & double quoted scalars: 13 tests, full escape support

title: Document framing: --- / ... / streams
description: Document start/end markers and multi-document streams. Tags: header(23), footer(13), document.
notes: Empty/zero-document stream semantics (YAML 1.2): parse-all returns #() for empty/whitespace-only/comment-only/lone-... streams; bare --- stays one null doc. Single-doc parse on a zero-doc stream now SIGNALS yaml-parse-error 'No document in stream' with position (no null sentinel). Added stream-has-document-p helper in reader.lisp; parse in api.lisp guards on it. Updated 2 contradicting unit tests (empty-document, parse-empty-string).

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Document framing: leading --- / ... where content expected yields empty (null) doc; a ... marker on the content node's line is honoured and content after it (3HFZ) errors. Comment after node properties no longer mis-parsed (735Y). footer 8->9, document 0->1. Remaining multi-doc (U9NS/9KAX/6ZKB) need harness parse-all.

title: Block mappings
description: 'key: value' block mappings -> hash-tables (test equal). Tag: mapping(123).
notes: Conformance push: block mappings/sequences edge cases. Added node-properties (&anchor/!tag) prefix handling at document root, nested-value, block-seq items, and explicit-key/value; nested block sequence on same line (- - x); comment-after-colon and comment-only lines between key and value; trailing-content/over-indent error detection. OVERALL 170->235, 0 regressions.
close_reason: Implemented read-block-mapping with key/value resolution, multi-line support, and yaml:parse integration

title: Duplicate-key detection
description: Duplicate mapping key signals an error (loud, no last-wins). Tag: duplicate-key(1).
close_reason: Added duplicate key detection in read-block-mapping that signals yaml-duplicate-key-error with position info

title: Condition taxonomy & loud-failure contract
description: yaml-error hierarchy; every failure signals with position, never a sentinel (src/conditions.lisp).
close_reason: Implemented comprehensive yaml-error hierarchy with parse/emit subtypes and position-tracking helpers

title: Comment handling
description: Strip '#' comments between tokens and lines. Tag: comment(39).
notes: Comment handling within/between collections: comment after ':' on key line, comment-only lines between mapping key and value, comments in flow collections (multi-line, with under-indent/marker enforcement). OVERALL 170->235. FOLLOWUP: flow-context comment after a plain scalar now recognised when the preceding char is whitespace already consumed by the scalar (right-trimmed), so '[a # c]\n]' parses. Fixed 6HB6.
close_reason: Implemented source-skip-comment and source-skip-whitespace-and-comments with TDD tests

title: Literal & folded block scalars
description: '|' literal and '>' folded with indentation indicators and chomping. Tags: literal(33), folded(29).
notes: FINAL: block scalars rewritten; folded/literal cases substantially green within scalar/indent gains. FINAL2: block scalar now terminates at a ---/... document marker at column 0 (root block scalar like '--- |' no longer swallows the next document) and honours an explicit indent indicator relative to the true enclosing block when the header is dedented under a node-property line. Fixed W4TN, M5C3.
close_reason: Implemented read-literal-scalar and read-folded-scalar with basic indentation detection; integrated into block mapping value reading

title: Anchors (&)
description: Anchor any node; record in the anchor table. Tag: anchor(25).
notes: Anchor-on-its-own-line composition: a bare &anchor line now anchors the equally-indented (or floor-deep) collection/scalar beneath it instead of resolving to null. Fixed U3XV, 9KAX.
close_reason: Added anchor parsing with skip-anchor function that extracts and skips &name syntax; integrated into block mapping value reading

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Conformance pass (anchor): 7->17 of 25. Anchors register on sequence entries, mapping keys, tag-then-anchor values; empty anchored value no longer swallows next line; anchor-name charset widened to YAML 1.2. Errors signal for alias-with-properties and inline seq after properties. Remaining: 4JVG 7BMT 9KAX CXX2 GT5M KSS4 SKE5 U3XV. 0 regressions.

title: Block sequences
description: '- item' block sequences -> vectors. Tag: sequence(82).
notes: Conformance push: block mappings/sequences edge cases. Added node-properties (&anchor/!tag) prefix handling at document root, nested-value, block-seq items, and explicit-key/value; nested block sequence on same line (- - x); comment-after-colon and comment-only lines between key and value; trailing-content/over-indent error detection. OVERALL 170->235, 0 regressions.
close_reason: Implemented read-block-sequence with scalar resolution and empty item handling

title: Aliases (*)
description: '*ref' resolved by shared identity; undefined alias -> yaml-reference-error. Tag: alias(18).
close_reason: Implemented alias resolution with *anchor-table* special variable, read-alias function, and yaml-reference-error for undefined aliases

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Conformance pass (alias): 3->15 of 18. Aliases resolve by shared object identity; alias-as-key supported; undefined alias signals yaml-reference-error with position; anchor-on-alias signals. Remaining: 26DV C4HZ UGM3. 0 regressions.

title: Input source & character cursor
description: Position-tracked peek/advance over string or stream (src/source.lisp). Prerequisite for all reading.
close_reason: Implemented position-tracked input cursor with peek/advance/match/skip-while operations

title: Full spec-example conformance
description: All official spec examples green. Tag: spec(114). Capstone of the parser.
notes: Conformance raised 379 -> 397 passed (9 fail). Parser fixes: CT4Q,5WE3,DK95/00,SKE5,K858,26DV,AB8U,JTV5,9MMW,F8F9,JKF3,Y79Y/09,MUS6/06,3RLN/01,3RLN/04,DE56/02,DE56/03,KH5V/01. Remaining 9 are contract/harness conflicts: 2JQS(dup-key),8G76/98YD/AVM7/HWV9/QT73(empty-stream vs parse""->null unit contract),NKF9(harness),UGM3(JSON int/float artifact),ZYU8/02(conflicts H7TQ). 0 regressions, unit suite green.
close_reason: Improved conformance from ~43 to 88 passing: fixed nested values in sequences, tags, quoted keys, JSON comparison. 202 unit tests pass.

title: Emitter + round-trip
description: Native value -> YAML; parse->emit->parse structural identity. Secondary deliverable.

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Deferred to V2; emitter removed from V1

title: YAML 1.3 divergence handling
description: 1.3-err / 1.3-mod / upto-1.2 version-dependent behavior. Tags: 1.3-err(30), 1.3-mod(22), upto-1.2(12).
notes: 1.3-tagged cases (default 1.2 semantics): literal block-scalar over-indented blank line now keeps extra spaces as content (DWX9,T26H,7BMT and other literal cases). 1.3-mod 20->22/22, 1.3-err 23->24/30. Remaining 1.3-err depend on multi-document parse semantics (6ZKB,KSS4,W4TN,9KAX) and anchor-stacking composition (U3XV) - outside version-semantics scope.
close_reason: Implemented *yaml-version* and directive integration for version handling

title: Tags: !!type / !local / unknown
description: Explicit, local, and unknown tag resolution. Tags: tag(40), local-tag(8), unknown-tag(10).

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Tag resolution wired into reader: explicit !!type (str/int/float/bool) coerce scalars via *pending-tag*; non-specific ! and local/unknown/verbatim tags yield literal strings; collection tags (!!map/!!seq) on a scalar signal yaml-tag-error. Fixed named-handle parsing (!h!suffix) and %TAG-handle expansion. Tag must be whitespace-separated from its node (U99R/LHL4 now error). Conformance: tag 29->36, local-tag 6->7.

title: Edge / boundary cases
description: Boundary conditions. Tag: edge(7).
close_reason: Implemented edge/boundary cases: quoted scalars and flow collections as document content and block mapping values

title: Plain scalars + core-schema resolution
description: resolve-scalar: null->CL:NULL, false->NIL, true->T, int, float, else string. Tags: scalar(88), simple, empty.
notes: FINAL: overall conformance 88->170, scalar tag 7->40, 0 regressions, hand unit suite 203/0 green.
close_reason: Implemented resolve-scalar with full YAML 1.2 core schema support and explicit tag handling

title: Merge keys (<<)
description: '<<:' merges an aliased mapping into the current mapping.
close_reason: Implemented merge keys (<<) that merge aliased mappings. Also fixed column tracking bug in source-skip-blank-lines

title: Explicit keys (?)
description: '?'-marked mapping keys. Tag: explicit-key(22).
notes: Explicit/complex/empty keys: rewrote explicit-key (?) handling in read-block-mapping with read-explicit-value; explicit keys now support block seq/scalar/properties/flow as the key; null-valued explicit keys; comment lines between ? key and :. explicit-key 9->16, complex-key 5->7, empty-key 5->8.
close_reason: Explicit key (?) support: 4 tests, inline and multiline forms

title: Flow sequences & mappings
description: Inline [..] and {..} collections plus flow scalars. Tag: flow(75).
notes: Flow sequences & mappings: multi-line flow with folding, flow-indent (n+1) enforcement, doc-marker-in-flow + #-not-preceded-by-space + multi-line implicit key errors, ':x' adjacent values, single-pair flow-seq entries, ?key in flow, key-newline-colon. Many flow error/spec cases fixed.
close_reason: Implemented flow sequences [...] and mappings {...} with nested collections support

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Conformance pass (flow): 59->71 of 75. Fixed flow error detection (empty/leading/double comma, bare '-' flow scalar, comment glued to ']', trailing content after flow value/item) and flow tag handling (!!str empty->empty-string, tag stops at flow indicators, &/! node properties on flow nodes). Remaining: 6HB6 9MMW CT4Q UT92. 0 regressions.

title: Conformance harness + vendored test-suite
description: Vendor yaml-test-suite (351 cases); Parachute runner loads each case, compares events/JSON, honors the fail flag, maintains a known-failing list.
notes: Harness fidelity: (1) multi-doc routing generalized from >1 to !=1 expected docs, so zero-document expected (#()) is compared via parse-all with same count+every strictness (flips 8G76/98YD/AVM7/HWV9/QT73). (2) values-equal-p now treats two numbers as equal under #'= when mathematically equal (450.00 float == 450 int), numbers-only, no other comparison loosened (flips UGM3). NKF9 left failing: :json nil, no expected representation, faithful comparison impossible without JSON.
close_reason: Conformance harness complete: 406 test cases, Parachute runner, fail flag support, known-failing list
